_comment: Fire Shrine reveal — camera path RECORDED IN-WORLD (/cutscene record, promoted 2026-07-23, replaces the offline-estimated path). Pans WEST (yaw ~88) toward the shrine and drops to the altar. Cues re-timed to the 70-tick recorded duration; nudge ticks for pacing. Trigger with 'cutscene play fire_shrine_reveal'.

cues.subtitle: §7Prove yourself worthy of the guardian within.
